case_title: **TRANSFERRED TO SOLANO COUNTY** DEEPAK MENON VS. GEOVERA HOLDINGS, INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION ET AL

docket_entries.description: LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE MARCH-21-2024 HEARING RE: DEFENDANT GEOVERA HOLDINGS, INC.'S MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. GEOVERA HOLDINGS, INC.'S MOTION FOR TRANSFER OF VENUE IS GRANTED PER THE PARTIES' STIPULATION. THE CASE IS TRANSFERRED TO SOLANO COUNTY. PLAINTIFF SHALL PAY THE TRANSFER FEES. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: V. DA FONSECA; NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-18-2024 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-11-2024 Continued To May-15-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE
Off Calendar Mar-21-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. SARAH ROBERTSON, Esq. of Constangy, Brooks, Smith, & Prophere, LLP (tel: 415-918-3000) for Defendant.
No other appearances appearances made in this matter.

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT GEOVERA HOLDINGS, INC.'s MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE.

Matter not argued/contested. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Geovera Holdings, Inc.'s motion for transfer of venue is granted per the parties' stipulation. The case is transferred to Solano County. Plaintiff shall pay the transfer fees.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)
